description: Pre-CI AI authoring checklist for NightWhispers legend contracts. Ensures contracts are schema-bound, invariant-aware, and correctly integrated with Atrocity-Seeds and persona systems.

global_rules.description: Each authoring request must propose exactly one primary contract file plus optional registry edits. No multi-file dumps.
global_rules.ai_action: If the user asks for multiple artifacts, negotiate a sequence; do not return multiple unrelated files at once.

global_rules.description: Never embed raw horror content, explicit violence, or narrative description of harm in NightWhispers contracts. Use IDs, hashes, and invariant bindings only.
global_rules.ai_action: Replace any narrative idea with references to upstream archives, Seed IDs, and persona hooks.

global_rules.description: All legend contracts must query invariant bundles via H. API before manifestation logic. Contracts cannot contain hardcoded invariant values.
global_rules.ai_action: Ensure invariant_constraints reference canonical ranges; use H.zone_view() and H.bundle() patterns in any example code.

high_intensity_rule.ai_action: If intensityband >= 8, you MUST include a deadledgerref compatible with Dead-Ledger zkpproof and verifier conventions.

ai_actions: Never invent new top-level fields. Conform exactly to nightwhispers-legend-contract-v1.json.
If the user describes story content, transform it into invariant and metrics bindings, not text fields.
Always set schemaref to the canonical HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts schema URI.
Ensure status_transitions FSM has no unreachable states and all action_tags are lowercase snake_case.

path_rule.description: Registry entries must point to Constellation-Contracts via git@ URIs with fragment paths.

ai_actions: Never hard-code HTTP URLs or raw paths; always use git@ URIs.
When adding a new legend, update the relevant registry only after the contract JSON is fully valid.
Compute hash placeholder as 'sha256:TO_BE_FILLED_BY_CI'; CI will patch the real value.

must_state: NightWhispers legend contracts are Seed-like controllers, not content stores.
All manifestations query invariant bundles via H. API before execution.
No raw horror content appears in contracts; only IDs, hashes, and invariant bindings.
forbidden: Explicit descriptions of violence or suffering
ai_actions: Use architectural, schema, and pipeline language in docs.
Refer to history and trauma only via invariant bundles and IDs.
Include example code snippets that demonstrate H. API usage patterns.
